query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.projectId, c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance, p.name as projectName FROM contacts c LEFT JOIN projects p ON c.projectId = p.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%Charlene%' OR c.name LIKE '%Howard%' LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.projectId, c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance, p.name as projectName FROM contacts c LEFT JOIN projects p ON c.projectId = p.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%Charlene%' OR c.name LIKE '%Howard%' LIMIT 20
